title: rubus × extensus
intro: Rubus × extensus, also known as the hybrid raspberry or raspberry-blackberry, is a cross between the Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus species, combining the characteristics of both plants. The medicinal properties of Rubus × extensus include its rich content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies. Rubus × extensus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and jams, allowing for various forms of consumption and use in traditional medicine.
